news.title: Trump tells CNBC 'we are very intent on making a deal' with Iran
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.

news.title: Oil tumbles after Trump puts hold on U.S. strikes against Iran energy infrastructure for five days
news.summary: President Donald Trump says the U.S. and Iran had productive talks over the weekend about ending the war. He says the talks were held at the White House.

news.title: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
news.summary: Wright's comments come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
news.summary: Central banker says policymaking is difficult in the current environment. In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking was difficult. He said it was difficult to make a decision on the direction of the country.

news.title: 'This is insane.' Long lines plague U.S. airports as TSA officers face second missed paycheck in shutdown
news.summary: TSA officers face second missed full paycheck. The Trump administration said it plans to send ICE officers to help ease airport congestion amid TSA officer absences.

news.title: Global oil prices fall 10% to $100 a barrel after Trump says he’s postponing attacks on Iran power plants following ‘productive conversations’ with Tehran to end the war
news.summary: President Donald Trump said the U.S. and Iran had “very good and productive conversations” in the past two days. Oil prices fell sharply on Monday after the comments.

news.title: Pfizer and French partner to seek approval for Lyme disease vaccine after late-stage trial
news.summary: Pfizer and French partner Valneva say they plan to seek regulatory approval for a Lyme disease vaccine after a late-stage trial.

news.title: Stocks are teetering on the edge of correction territory. Why the ‘TACO trade’ could flop.
news.summary: The once-reliable trade on Wall Street, that President Trump “always chickens out,” could be torpedoed by the Iran conflict.

news.title: Why oil had been nearing peak even before Trump statement on Iran, according to top economists
news.summary: Krugman and Brooks believe we are near to the peak in oil prices. Demand destruction takes place if it goes much higher, they say.

news.title: ‘The bank told me I could be liable’: I found out why my brother, who has a reverse mortgage, ran out of money
news.summary: “I’m angry, but also sad,” she says. “I'm angry, and sad.” “It’s a shame,’ she adds.
